name: pathfinder
description: Pathfinder - white-label web platform for emergency floorplan mapping and 3D facility documentation. Open Source Community Edition.

scripts.db:seed:local: node scripts/seed-dev.mjs > .wrangler/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute pathfinder --local --file=.wrangler/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:hierarchy:local: node scripts/seed-hierarchy.mjs > .wrangler/seed-hierarchy.sql && wrangler d1 execute pathfinder --local --file=.wrangler/seed-hierarchy.sql
scripts.e2e:serve: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local && npm run db:seed:hierarchy:local && wrangler pages dev .svelte-kit/cloudflare --port 4173 --local --d1 DB=33c6c16e-5849-4aec-8afa-49ee6fdf87d7
